texto: [He was aware] of the value of the word of praise dropped at exactly the right moment
autor: and he would have thought himself extremely stupid to withhold what cost him so little and was productive of such desirable results.
explicacao: Citação de and he would have thought himself extremely stupid to withhold what cost him so little and was productive of such desirable results. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “[He was aware] of the value of the word of praise dropped at exactly the right moment” articula tempo, georgette-heyer, sylvester em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como sylvester.
